title: Chocolate O's
ingredients: ½ cup plus 2 tbsp chopped walnuts (optional)
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Lightly grease an 8-inch square pan with butter.
Melt the chocolate and butter in a double boiler and in stages in microwave.
Place the sugar in a medium-size mixing bowl and pour in the chocolate mixture.
Using an electric mixer on medium speed, mix until blended.
Scrape the bowl with a rubber spatula.
Add the vanilla.
With the mixer on medium-low speed, add the eggs one at a time, blending after each egg addition.
Scrape the bowl with spatula and blend for 30 more seconds until velvety.
Add the flour on low speed and mix for 20 seconds.
Finish the mixing by hand.
Stir in ½ cup nuts if using.
Spread the batter in prepared pan and sprinkle remaining nuts on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool to room temperature.
Melt the chocolate.
Pour the evaporated milk in a blender, add sugar and melted chocolate.
Blend on medium-low speed until frosting thickens, about 45 seconds.
Using a frosting spatula, spread the frosting evenly over the surface of the brownies.
Allow to sit for 1 hour before cutting.
